conclusion: There is a simple Route-E-style exact-family candidate beyond the old defect-bit splice coordinates. The displayed candidate is exact on checked odd moduli 5,7,9,11,13. Within this candidate, colors 3 and 4 remain Hamilton on the checked range, while colors 0,1,2 still require a separate Hamiltonicity analysis.
family: Fix Sel* colors 3 and 4. Assign colors 0,1,2 by one fixed permutation on S0, S1, S4+, the full slice-2 active-set class S2(A2), and the one-bit slice-3 class S3(1 in A3).
